Nubs Nob (Harbor Springs).conditions: No bare spots anywhere- skied the red loop - a hard pack very well groomed base with an inch of  fresh on top. . Snow was granular , high moisture and a bit sticky for my wax , HF7 : but I bet others got it right . Bluebird day on a great trail !

nubsNob.liftsOpen: All 8 lifts, Rope Tow and Space Worm
nubsNob.xcTrails: All trails will be groomed and tracked this morning. Conditions will be a little soft, but very good.
nubsNob.nightSkiing: Tonight is the final night of night skiing.
nubsNob.comments: Yesterday a heavy wet snow fell most of the day. Overnight this snow dried out thanks to cold temperatures. The primary surface is expertly groomed snow in superb condition for skiing and riding. The temperature is forecast to stay just below freezing and we anticipate some sunshine to make a great day on the slopes even better. NASTAR racing today from 12:30 to 2:30 p.m. on Birch Run. The soup of the day is white chicken chili. Pintail Peak Lodge is open with food and an espresso bar. The lift will spin from 9:00 a.m. to 9:00 p.m. for our final night of night skiing. We will take an hour break at 4:30 p.m. to groom for night skiing. Make it a great day at Nub's Nob.
